thought.text: 让我手动运行一下 task1 程序来测试它是否能正常工作：

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && ./build/task/1/task1 test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c /tmp/output.txt && cat /tmp/output.txt", "summary": "Test the lexer with a simple test case"}

summary: Test the lexer with a simple test case
